title: To His Book (2)
content:
Take mine advice, and go not near
    Those faces, sour as vinegar;
    For these, and nobler numbers, can
    Ne'er please the supercilious man.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To His Book (2)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
